understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level (BP35 here) without landing on spike tiles `u`/`v`, completing levels efficiently within the attempt/turn limits and continuing until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after the horizontal step, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (`o`,`m`,`w`), hit a hazard (spikes end the run immediately), or reach the goal `+`. CLICK targets a coordinate to interact with/remove clickable breakable blocks `x` to open or change fall paths; it can cause an immediate fall if it removes support in the gravity direction. UNDO reverts the previous action. Movement previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) indicate where you will ultimately land after gravity, helping identify safe passage drops to new sections.
